validation_loss.description: Plain support-set validation loss and adaptation gain.

conformal_validation_rank.description: Conformal-style nonconformity ranks from support validation losses.

router_margin.description: LLM-router-style confidence margin between structured and fallback branches on support.

metadata_alpha_control.description: Non-deployable metadata control using true alpha.
